blockG.scope: MVE Phase 1 Block G west three-game
blockG.primaryArtifactBinding: A_ARI_SD moneyline contest 26/speculation 66 because schema-backed mm-live-canary artifacts bind one primary target; B/C evidence is included as additional Block G targets.

verdict.label: FULL_GREEN
verdict.reason: Block G west three-game Phase 1 run completed setup, live, and postgame lifecycle with caveats: contests 26, 27, and 28 were created/verified; moneyline/spread/total speculations 66-74 were seeded; candidates and dry-run passed with strict allowlist [26,27,28]; the first live attempt posted no quotes because risk refused at the 0.24/0.15 USDC bankroll exposure ceiling; risk caps were reduced to 0.001 USDC per quote and 0.285 USDC sport/team before retry; the retry posted 18 tiny live quotes and controlled fills landed on A moneyline, B spread, and C total; stream-health holds entered and cleared before quote posting; OwnerPositionStatusForUnknownPosition/bad own-state counts were zero; open commitments ended at zero for contests 26-28; official final scores were verified; score requests/callbacks, settlement events for specs 66-74, and claim txs completed; final target wallets active/pendingSettle/claimable counts were zero.

caveats: First live attempt was a no-quote risk refusal at the bankroll exposure ceiling (0.24 / 0.15 USDC worst-case); retry used reduced caps of 0.001 USDC per quote and 0.285 USDC sport/team.
Startup stream-health hold entered with exposureWei6=242000 and cleared before live submit/fill in both first attempt and retry.

Controlled fill previews initially retried smaller risk because 0.002 USDC requested taker risk exceeded the visible remaining maker risk for the selected quote; successful fills used 0.001 USDC target risk.
C_COL_LAD scoring required two score-request txs before the score callback appeared; final score callback and postgame zero-state completed.

walletReality.note: Current total USDC across stage-maker-a, stage-maker-b, flow-a, fresh-user is enough only with very small manual/live risks and tight distribution; no extra crypto requested yet, but setup will stop and ask if any balance/allowance preflight fails.

notes: Bounded approvals only; no unlimited approvals.
Will use corrected fill sizing (start small, preview, retry smaller/different quote if needed).

firstLiveAttempt.caveat: bankroll exposure ceiling at 0.24/0.15 USDC; no quotes posted

errors.message: Match would revert: fillMakerRisk=1700 not in (0, remaining=1000]. Choose a different takerDesiredRiskWei6.
Match would revert: fillMakerRisk=1200 not in (0, remaining=1000]. Choose a different takerDesiredRiskWei6.
Match would revert: fillMakerRisk=1800 not in (0, remaining=1000]. Choose a different takerDesiredRiskWei6.
